'''ngavotho''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:featherwork|featherwork]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ng-v-th
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:featherwork|featherwork]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| ngavotho
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngævetheth|ngævetheth]] || [[word:ngævethej|ngævethej]] || [[word:ngævethesh|ngævethesh]] || [[word:ngævethe|ngævethe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngavovothoth|ngavovothoth]] || [[word:ngavovothoj|ngavovothoj]] || [[word:ngavovothosh|ngavovothosh]] || [[word:ngavovotho|ngavovotho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngavothoth|ngavothoth]] || [[word:ngavothoj|ngavothoj]] || [[word:ngavothosh|ngavothosh]] || [[word:ngavotho|ngavotho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngavofthofth|ngavofthofth]] || [[word:ngavofthofj|ngavofthofj]] || [[word:ngavofthofsh|ngavofthofsh]] || [[word:ngavofthof|ngavofthof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:ngavothotho|ngavothotho]] || [[word:ngavothojo|ngavothojo]] || [[word:ngavothosho|ngavothosho]] || [[word:ngavothoko|ngavothoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:ngavothoth|ngavothoth]] || [[word:ngavothoj|ngavothoj]] || [[word:ngavothosh|ngavothosh]] || [[word:ngavotho|ngavotho]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:ngavothothol|ngavothothol]] || [[word:ngavothojol|ngavothojol]] || [[word:ngavothoshol|ngavothoshol]] || [[word:ngavothokol|ngavothokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:ngavothoothotho|ngavothoothotho]] || [[word:ngavothoojojo|ngavothoojojo]] || [[word:ngavothooshosho|ngavothooshosho]] || [[word:ngavothooko|ngavothooko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:ngavothothon|ngavothothon]] || [[word:ngavothojon|ngavothojon]] || [[word:ngavothoshon|ngavothoshon]] || [[word:ngavothokon|ngavothokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:ngavothothooro|ngavothothooro]] || [[word:ngavothojooro|ngavothojooro]] || [[word:ngavothoshooro|ngavothoshooro]] || [[word:ngavothokooro|ngavothokooro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|1e8b6ef}}
